blocks.text: Arsenal five clear — Arteta's side beat Chelsea to tighten title grip
Arsenal's 2-1 win over Chelsea opens a 5-point gap over Manchester City with the title race entering its decisive phase. Arteta's side are making a powerful statement.
⚽ Real Madrid vs Getafe 21:00 — La Liga home duty, title race backdrop
